variants: Tasya Mahendra currently resides in Copperbloom Harbor, where she works diligently at Vale Engine Technologies. Originally from Seraphim Path, she earned her engineering degree from Cinderfield Polytechnic, laying the foundation for her successful career in technology. Her expertise and dedication have not gone unnoticed; she received the Umbral Crest Merit for her distinguished contributions to the field. Through her work, Tasya continues to push the boundaries of engineering and inspire those around her.
